allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; ms=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; [print\(m['id'],'|',m.get\('pricing',{}\).get\('prompt','?'\),'/', m.get\('pricing',{}\).get\('completion','?'\)\) for m in ms if 'stheno' in m['id'].lower\(\) or 'sao10k' in m['id'].lower\(\) or 'l3' in m['id'].lower\(\)]")
